Effect setup, boundaries, 224-file docs policy, 167-file/16-mirror skill policy, three-workflow authority policy, controls, ten journeys, 76 tooling tests, type-aware Ultracite, lint fixture, Knip, five typechecks, and 262 app/package tests passed with the public synthetic Executor endpoint and no provider call.
